reviews.comment:
Se trata de la sede central del Automóvil Club Argentino (ACA). La gasolinera es uno de sus muchos servicios. La institución se destaca por su orden, eficiencia, limpieza, buena atención en todas sus actividades. Posee un museo emblemàtico sobre automóviles en la República Argentina.

(Translated by Google)
This is the headquarters of the Argentine Automobile Club (ACA). The gas station is one of its many services. The institution is known for its orderliness, efficiency, cleanliness, and excellent customer service in all its activities. It houses a landmark museum dedicated to automobiles in Argentina.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHMnNiZ2pnRRAB
